title: Chog
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Corporate |image=[[File:Chog.jpg]] |name=Chog |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]][[Union 1|''Union'' 1]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Chog says the dress was computer generated, based on mistress Mara's measurements and other numbers…''"
"''Tell him we're looking for something more art than it is science…|[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] comment on Chog's designs|}} '''Chog''' was an [[Alien/Legends|alien]] clothing designer on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] who used mathematics to tailor each piece of clothing to a client. He designed one of the many dresses for [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade's]] [[Marriage/Legends|wedding]], but it was one of the many that were rejected by the bride-to-be. ==Appearances== *[[Union 1|''Union'' 1]] {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Chog }} [[Category:Coruscanti]] [[Category:Fashion designers]] [[Category:Individuals of unidentified species]] [[Category:Males]]
